case_title: ADRIENNE PARTRIDGE VS. CHRISTINA SAGONOWSKY et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-28-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH DEFENDANTS TO APR-10-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT BUT WAS REPRESENTED BY GREGORY PARTRIDGE--BROTHER. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)

DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. FIOL. NOT REPORTED. (D-506).
